oracle_provenance: LSM oracle claims are module-pristine single-column/real-module checksummed or operational gates; documented-boundary schemes do not claim a real oracle. No clean uninstrumented wrf.exe claim is made.
bar: every scheme EXACTLY ONE of: (a) operational+real-oracle-GREEN, (b) reference-only WITH real pristine-WRF oracle wired fail-closed, (c) documented-boundary-fail-closed (architecture-scale, real test) / proven-irrelevant

0.name: no LSM (nolsmscheme)
0.note: trivial bulk surface path; sf=0 disabled.

1.name: 5-layer thermal-diffusion SLAB (slabscheme)
1.note: operational + fp64 oracle GREEN. v0.18 closed the L2 handoff: real-case SlabStaticBundle extraction (THC=THERIN/100, EMISS=SFEM by LU_INDEX/season; fixed WRF 5-layer ZS/DZS) -> generic coupled L2 sweep now runs sf=1. Required fixing the held-radiation None-unpack + the 4-vs-5 soil-layer mismatch.

3.name: RUC multi-layer soil/snow (ruclsmscheme)
3.oracle_real: sha256 of recorded checksum matches pristine phys/module_sf_ruclsm.F
fail_closed_layers: operational scan rejects with named reason
3.faithful_port_reason: ~7.5k-LOC coupled multi-layer soil/snow + implicit tridiagonal solve + multi-layer snow; a faithful in-session port becomes a happy-path/self-compare

4.name: Noah-MP (noahmpscheme)
4.oracle_path: proofs/noamp energy_savepoint_gate (real NOAHMP_SFLX, 11 Canary d03 columns)
4.coupled_gate: PASS (proofs/v016/coverage/lsm4_gate.json) after fixing the generic-path noahmp_rad seeding gap
4.note: operational + real energy oracle GREEN (needs WRF_PRISTINE_ROOT override; default-path robustness noted). Generic single-domain coupled gate now PASS.

5.name: CLM4 (clmscheme)
fail_closed_layers: catalog RECOGNIZED_FAIL_CLOSED with specific architecture reason
namelist rejects naming CLM4 + v1.0 CAM/CLM/CTSM boundary
5.rationale: phys/module_sf_clm.F ~61.5k LOC, global clmtype PFT/column/landunit subgrid hierarchy from an external CLM surface dataset + netCDF MEGAN/SNICAR; faithful single-column oracle is itself architecture-scale (multi-session). Manager-approved v1.0 CAM/CLM/CTSM-family ADR boundary; carried OPEN, NOT a fake green, NOT a happy-path stub.

6.name: CTSM (ctsmscheme)
6.rationale: phys/module_sf_ctsm.F compiled only under -DWRF_USE_CTSM; runs the FULL external CESM/CTSM land model via the LILAC coupler (empty WRF-side Registry state -> NO in-core prognostic land state). No in-core WRF physics to oracle without the external coupled-model build. v1.0 CAM/CLM/CTSM boundary; documented fail-closed.

7.name: Pleim-Xiu 2-layer ISBA (pxlsmscheme)
7.note: operational + fp64 oracle GREEN. v0.18 closed the L2 handoff: real-case PleimXiuStaticBundle extraction (Noilhan-Mahfouf SOILPROP ISBA constants bit-match the pxlsm oracle to ~1e-16; WRF PX ds1/ds2=0.01/0.99; RSTMIN/EMISS/ZNT by LU_INDEX) -> generic coupled L2 sweep now runs sf=7.

8.name: SSiB biophysical canopy/soil/snow (ssibscheme)
8.oracle_real: sha256 of recorded checksum matches pristine phys/module_sf_ssib.F
fail_closed_layers: operational scan rejects with named reason
8.faithful_port_reason: ~6.6k-LOC coupled SiB biophysical canopy/soil/snow solver; faithful in-session port becomes a happy-path/self-compare

l2_statics_handoff.owner: this worker (handed off by PBL/schemes worker)
l2_statics_handoff.falsifiable_validation: SOILPROP ISBA constants bit-match the pxlsm fp64 oracle (worst rtol ~1.9e-16 across all 11 constants)
bugs_fixed_to_run_operationally: operational_mode.py slab/PX held-radiation passed held_rad=None -> 3-tuple unpack crash on non-radiation-cadence steps (now passes a concrete (gsw,glw,cosz) 3-tuple like Noah-classic)
extraction inherited the wrfinput Noah 4-layer ZS/DZS -> slab needs its fixed 5-layer geometry; PX needs ds1/ds2=0.01/0.99 (both corrected, regression-tested)

slab_surface_hook FLHC=HFX/(THG-THX) reconstruction is ill-posed near neutral (DTheta->0 => FLHC->inf) -> TSK runaway -> dynamics blow-up; WRF-faithful fix caps FLHC at WRF's exact PSIT>=2 ceiling (module_sf_sfclay.F:706 'PREVENT LARGE FLHC IN SOIL MODEL'). FLQC capped at WRF's water-branch PSIQ>=2 ceiling (:731) as an HONEST conservative guard (land PSIQ is NOT floored). PX verified NO such defect (clipped RMOL, resistance-form HFX).

sf=4 Noah-MP generic single-domain gate crashed _NoahMPRadiation(*None): _initial_carry_for_run never seeded noahmp_rad on the non-post-replace path (GPT-critic find). Fixed via append-only noahmp_land namelist field (registered in OperationalNamelist pytree flatten/unflatten) seeded by _initial_carry_for_run; gate builds the full Noah-MP bundle. Non-breaking (pipelines still post-replace when noahmp_land=None).

coupled_gate.sf1_slab: PASS (proofs/v016/coverage/lsm1_gate.json: all_finite, 0 bounds violations, no hard fails, dyn RMSE 16.5% of v0.14 tolerance)
coupled_gate.sf4_noahmp: PASS (proofs/v016/coverage/lsm4_gate.json: all_finite, 0 bounds violations, no hard fails, dyn RMSE 23.3% of tolerance; full Noah-MP bundle seeded)
coupled_gate.sf7_pleim_xiu: PASS (proofs/v016/coverage/lsm7_gate.json: all_finite, 0 bounds violations, dyn RMSE 18% of tolerance)
coupled_gate.note: GPT critic (proofs/v018/lsm_critic_gpt.md) FIX-then-ACCEPT: FLHC fix confirmed WRF-faithful; 2 must-fixes (sf=4 gate crash + FLQC overclaim) both resolved + green. FLHC blow-up was the 2nd pre-existing coupling bug a v0.18 family worker surfaced (after RA RTHRATEN-NaN); the critic sweep surfaced the sf=4 gap.
